Class VectorToolIndex

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.tool.toolsearch.index.vectorstore.VectorToolIndex
All Implemented Interfaces:
Closeable, AutoCloseable, ToolIndex
public class VectorToolIndex extends Object implements Closeable, ToolIndex
Vector-based tool searcher for semantic search of tool descriptions.

This class provides semantic search capabilities using vector embeddings, allowing for more intelligent matching based on meaning rather than just keywords. Uses Spring AI's VectorStore for vector storage.

Since:
2.0.0
Author:
Christian Tzolov

  • Method Details

    • clearIndex

      public void clearIndex(String sessionId)
      Description copied from interface: ToolIndex
      Clears all indexed tools for the specified session.
      Specified by:
      clearIndex in interface ToolIndex
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session identifier

    • indexTool

      public void indexTool(String sessionId, ToolReference toolReference)
      Description copied from interface: ToolIndex
      Registers a tool in the search index for the specified session.
      Specified by:
      indexTool in interface ToolIndex
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session identifier for tool isolation
      toolReference - the reference to the tool being indexed

    • indexTools

      public void indexTools(String sessionId, List<ToolReference> toolReferences)
      Description copied from interface: ToolIndex
      Registers multiple tools in the search index for the specified session in a single batch operation.

      Implementations should override this method when a batch operation is more efficient than repeated ToolIndex.indexTool(String, ToolReference) calls (e.g. a single embedding API call or a single write transaction). The default implementation simply iterates and delegates to ToolIndex.indexTool(String, ToolReference).

      Specified by:
      indexTools in interface ToolIndex
      Parameters:
      sessionId - the session identifier for tool isolation
      toolReferences - the tools to register

    • search

      public ToolSearchResponse search(ToolSearchRequest toolSearchRequest)
      Description copied from interface: ToolIndex
      Searches for tools matching the given request criteria.
      Specified by:
      search in interface ToolIndex
      Parameters:
      toolSearchRequest - the search request containing query and parameters
      Returns:
      a response containing matching tool references
